arcs.title: The Gringotts Efficiency Inquiry
arcs.summary: New arc opening: the Gringotts Senior Audit Subcommittee has quietly initiated a review of Liaison Wing efficiency following the fortnight of accumulating incidents. No one has told Christine. The Duty Goblin has been asked to maintain a log. He has begun the log. The log's first entry reads: 'Monday. Corridor clock chimed once. Harcourt matter resolved before chime completed. Duration of chime: four seconds.' Day 2 should establish that Christine becomes aware of the audit, probably through means the Subcommittee did not intend.
